Keryx: AI-powered LinkedIn outreach pipeline that scrapes profiles with Playwright stealth, extracts structured data via LLM, and generates hyper-personalized connection notes and DMs using LangGraph orchestration with fault-tolerant SQLite caching.
Bluppi: Synchronized music streaming app utilizing distributed clock synchronization over gRPC in Golang. Handles real-time audio stream coordination across multiple clients with sub-10ms drift tolerance.
WizFlow: Real-time workflow automation engine built with event-driven architecture. Won 2nd Place at Nutanix Hackathon. Features drag-and-drop DAG builder with live execution monitoring.
